title: corryocactus aureus
intro: Corryocactus aureus, also known as the golden rat tail cactus, is a type of epiphytic cactus native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Corryocactus aureus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Corryocactus aureus may be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
